# CLAUDE

This repository contains Claude Code global prompts for personal use.

| Skill | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| commit | 提交代码、跟踪 PR 状态、完成代码合并 |
| debug-repo | clone paraflow 项目的 git 仓库并进行分析 |
| github-todo | 查询所有与我相关的 GitHub Issue 和 PR (assigned, authored, mentioned, review-requested)，按类型分组显示 |
| issue | 明确问题和需求，创建 Github Issue 记录有关信息，便于之后查看和跟踪进度 |
| jira-todo | 查找 MOXT 项目中分配给我的未完成 Jira 任务，按类型分组显示 |

---

*This document was automatically generated based on commit [`1cbdaccde68952e59287d74c2a6e3868cd588cbe`](https://github.com/erickchenyn/claude/commit/1cbdaccde68952e59287d74c2a6e3868cd588cbe).*
